cloudwatch.alarm.metric.CfnAbout: The `Metric` property type represents a specific metric. `Metric` is a property of the [MetricStat](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-cloudwatch-alarm-metricstat.html) property type.

cloudwatch.alarm.metric.Dimensions.Description: The metric dimensions that you want to be used for the metric that the alarm will watch..

cloudwatch.alarm.metric.MetricName.Description: The name of the metric that you want the alarm to watch. This is a required field.

cloudwatch.alarm.metric.Namespace.Description: The namespace of the metric that the alarm will watch.
